nasb.text: As soon as he was removed from the highway, all the men passed on after Joab to pursue Sheba the son of Bichri.

esv.text: When he was taken out of the highway, all the people went on after Joab to pursue Sheba the son of Bichri.

cnv.text: 屍體從大道上挪去以後，眾人就都過去，跟隨約押去追趕比基利的兒子示巴。

ccb.text: 尸体搬走以后，大家都跟随约押去追比基利的儿子示巴。
